variants: Miruna Vladescu is known for her groundbreaking contributions to Counselor Education, particularly with her authored work, the Windveil Compass Model. Passionate about blending the arts with education, she is also an engaged member of the Harlequin Dancers Society. Under the supervision of her mentor and doctoral advisor, Ana Livia, Miruna has developed her unique methodologies in counseling. The Prairie Lantern Squad has recognized the importance of her work and has become her primary funding source, enabling her to advance significant research initiatives in her field.
